title: Mudit Sharma – Khudrang Kalakaar Wall Painting Portfolio Website

requirements.summary: Apply consistent visual theme: white/light grey backgrounds, Poppins font, bold uppercase headings, uniform spacing, earthy accent colors, and minimal clean layout
acceptanceCriteria: Background is white or light grey throughout
Poppins font is applied globally
All section headings are bold
Margins and spacing are consistent across all pages/sections
An earthy accent color is used for highlights and decorative elements

file_operations.description: Import Poppins font from Google Fonts, set global font family to Poppins, define CSS custom properties for white background (#FFFFFF), light grey (#F5F5F5), and earthy accent color (terracotta #D2691E or ochre #CC7722), apply base typography styles with bold uppercase section headings, and establish consistent margin and padding utility classes

Extend Tailwind theme to include Poppins as default font family, add custom colors for light grey background and earthy accent (terracotta/ochre), configure spacing scale for consistent margins and padding across all sections

requirements.summary: Create full-screen Cover Section displaying artist name, subtitle, location, experience badge, and tagline over hero mural background image with semi-transparent overlay
acceptanceCriteria: Full-screen hero section displays the mural background image
Artist name, subtitle, location, experience, and tagline are all visible
A semi-transparent overlay ensures text readability over the image
Layout is centered and visually impactful

file_operations.description: Create full-screen hero component with background image from frontend/public/assets/generated/cover-hero.dim_1920x1080.png, semi-transparent dark overlay (rgba(0,0,0,0.4)), centered content displaying 'MUDIT SHARMA' in large bold text, subtitle 'Professional Wall Painting Artist', location '📍 Bikaner, Rajasthan', experience badge '🖌 5+ Years Experience', and tagline '"Transforming Blank Walls into Meaningful Art."' with responsive typography and proper contrast
Import and render HeroSection component as the first section in the App layout

requirements.summary: Create About the Artist section with heading, professional portrait placeholder, and bio text in two-column layout
acceptanceCriteria: Section heading 'About Mudit Sharma' is displayed prominently
Full bio paragraph text is present and readable
Layout uses a two-column arrangement (image placeholder + text) on wider screens
Section is visually balanced

file_operations.description: Create About section component with id 'about' for scroll navigation, bold heading 'About Mudit Sharma', two-column responsive layout (portrait on left, bio text on right), portrait image from frontend/public/assets/generated/artist-portrait.dim_800x900.png, and bio text: 'Mudit Sharma is a professional wall painting artist based in Bikaner, Rajasthan, with over 5 years of experience in residential, commercial, and public mural projects. He specializes in customized wall art that enhances spaces and creates strong visual impact. His focus is on clean finishing, creative concepts, and complete client satisfaction.'
Import and render AboutSection component after HeroSection in the App layout

requirements.summary: Create Services Offered section with heading and 7 services in responsive grid with checkmark icons
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 services are listed with checkmark icons
Section heading 'Our Services' is bold and prominent
Services are displayed in a responsive grid (2–3 columns on desktop, 1 column on mobile)
Each service item is clearly readable

file_operations.description: Create Services section component with id 'services', bold heading 'Our Services', responsive grid layout (3 columns on desktop, 2 on tablet, 1 on mobile), and display all 7 services with checkmark icons: 'Home Wall Murals', 'Kids Room Theme Painting', 'Café & Restaurant Concept Walls', 'Hotel & Resort Artwork', 'Public Infrastructure Art', '3D Illusion Wall Designs', 'Custom Hand-Painted Designs'
Import and render ServicesSection component after AboutSection in the App layout

requirements.summary: Create Why Choose Us section with heading and 6 trust points in grid with checkmark icons and differentiated background
acceptanceCriteria: All 6 trust points are displayed with checkmark icons
Section heading 'Why Clients Trust Us' is bold and prominent
Points are arranged in a grid (2–3 columns on desktop)
Section uses a slightly different background shade to visually differentiate it

file_operations.description: Create Why Choose Us section component with id 'why-us', light grey (#F5F5F5) background for visual differentiation, bold heading 'Why Clients Trust Us', responsive grid layout (3 columns on desktop, 2 on tablet, 1 on mobile), and display all 6 trust points with checkmark icons: '5+ Years Practical Experience', 'Unique Custom Designs', 'Premium Quality Paints', 'Professional & Clean Work', 'On-Time Project Completion', 'Budget-Friendly Packages'
Import and render WhyChooseSection component after ServicesSection in the App layout

requirements.summary: Create 5 Featured Project sections with 70/30 image-to-text layout, project details, and alternating layouts
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 project sections are present in order
Each project shows a large image (~70% width) and a text panel (~30% width)
Project name, description, and location (where applicable) are displayed
Alternate image-left/image-right layout between projects for visual variety
Sections are clearly separated with consistent spacing

file_operations.description: Create reusable ProjectSection component accepting props for project name, description, location badge (optional), image path, and layout direction (image-left or image-right), with 70% image width and 30% text panel width, responsive stacking on mobile

Create FeaturedProjects container component with id 'projects' that renders 5 ProjectSection instances with alternating layouts: (1) 'Café Wall Art Project' using frontend/public/assets/generated/project-cafe.dim_1200x800.png with description 'vibrant Instagram-worthy atmosphere, enhances interior vibe, modern aesthetic' (image-left), (2) 'Sawai Madhopur Overbridge' using frontend/public/assets/generated/project-overbridge.dim_1200x800.png with location 'Sawai Madhopur' and description 'public infrastructure mural, beautifies overbridge, reflects cultural identity' (image-right), (3) 'Sanskriti Fort & Resort' using frontend/public/assets/generated/project-fort-resort.dim_1200x800.png with description 'heritage-themed property, enhances royal ambiance, fine detailing' (image-left), (4) 'Hotel & Resort Wall Art' using frontend/public/assets/generated/project-hotel.dim_1200x800.png with description 'elevates guest experience, creative visual storytelling, adds character and sophistication' (image-right), (5) 'Jiman Restaurant – Bikaner' using frontend/public/assets/generated/project-restaurant.dim_1200x800.png with location 'Bikaner' and description 'traditional restaurant vibe, enhances customer engagement, memorable dining atmosphere' (image-left)
Import and render FeaturedProjects component after WhyChooseSection in the App layout

requirements.summary: Create Contact section with heading, location, Instagram link, WhatsApp placeholder, availability note, and WhatsApp CTA button with distinct background
acceptanceCriteria: Heading 'Let's Transform Your Space' is displayed
Location, Instagram handle, WhatsApp placeholder, and availability note are all shown
Instagram handle is a clickable link
A WhatsApp CTA button is present
Section has a visually distinct background to signal end-of-page

file_operations.description: Create Contact section component with id 'contact', distinct background color (light grey or subtle earthy tone), bold heading 'Let's Transform Your Space', display location '📍 Bikaner, Rajasthan', Instagram handle '@khudrangkalakaar' as clickable link to https://instagram.com/khudrangkalakaar, WhatsApp placeholder text 'WhatsApp: [Add Number]', availability note 'Available for Residential & Commercial Projects', and prominent WhatsApp CTA button (linking to WhatsApp with placeholder)
Import and render ContactSection component after FeaturedProjects in the App layout

requirements.summary: Add sticky navigation bar with brand name, smooth-scroll anchor links, and mobile hamburger menu
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar is fixed at the top and visible while scrolling
All 5 nav links scroll smoothly to their respective sections
Artist brand name is displayed on the left
On mobile, a hamburger menu reveals the nav links
Active section is visually indicated in the nav

file_operations.description: Create sticky navigation component fixed at top with white/light background and subtle shadow, display 'Khudrang Kalakaar' brand name on left, render anchor links on right (About, Services, Why Us, Projects, Contact) that smoothly scroll to corresponding section IDs, implement active section highlighting based on scroll position, and add hamburger menu toggle for mobile viewports that reveals nav links in dropdown/overlay
Import and render Navigation component at the top of the App layout before all sections, ensure proper z-index stacking
Create custom hook to track which section is currently in viewport based on scroll position, returning active section ID for navigation highlighting

requirements.summary: Render all generated images as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated/ and reference them in respective components
acceptanceCriteria: All images load correctly from frontend/public/assets/generated/
No broken image links on any section
Images are responsive and maintain aspect ratio

file_operations.description: Ensure hero background image references frontend/public/assets/generated/cover-hero.dim_1920x1080.png with proper responsive sizing and aspect ratio
Ensure portrait image references frontend/public/assets/generated/artist-portrait.dim_800x900.png with responsive sizing and aspect ratio preservation

Verify all 5 project images correctly reference their respective files from frontend/public/assets/generated/: project-cafe.dim_1200x800.png, project-overbridge.dim_1200x800.png, project-fort-resort.dim_1200x800.png, project-hotel.dim_1200x800.png, and project-restaurant.dim_1200x800.png with responsive sizing and aspect ratio preservation
